name: Hypoallergenic Adult Medium Breed Dry Dog Food with Salmon
description: Hill's Science Plan Hypoallergenic medium adult dog food with salmon it is a gentle recipe formulated with limited high quality novel protein sources & no grain tailored to meet the needs of dogs with sensitivities. Key Benefits: High quality salmon and tuna as only intact animal protein sources With potatoes and other easy to digest ingredients gentle on the stomach With Omega-3 and Omega-6 fatty acids for healthy skin nourishment
